text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of summer camp and, along
with it, our training for the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My preliminary checks are done, and the special
preparations I arranged for the day are all ready
to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll do everything I can to help Admire Vega
improve as she dashes forward to seize her heart's
desires!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why does your face look a little red?
choice_data_list: Oh. I was just running around a bit...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Drink water and loosen your collar. There's shade
over there.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We can start training in twenty minutes. That
okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You can't follow me if you fall ill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Acting like an older sister, she seems naturally
adept at taking care of others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I hurry toward the shade as
instructed.
